flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Galveston College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (41.1% → 32.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Galveston College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.3k → $2.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Galveston College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $6.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Galveston College rose 28% between 2015 and 2018 (46.1% → 59.1%).
